_comment_: Editorial contrast-pair presets for /brain/compare. Each preset replaces the active set with the given (viewSlug, networkId) tuples. Order in this file is rendering order. Activity-view presets (Reading vs Scrolling, Face-to-face vs AI Chatbot, Sustained Film vs Short-form Video) land in Phase E once the underlying activity views ship.

presets.label: Mode 04 ↔ DMN
presets.subtitle: Same medial territory, two papers' names. Brighter regions are where Paunov 2022's Imagining Other Minds and Menon 2011's Default Mode Network agree on the parcels.

presets.label: Language + word recognition
presets.subtitle: Reading lights both: M03 names the language network as a whole; VWFA names the focal patch that recognises written words within it.

presets.label: Executive control
presets.subtitle: Mode 01 (logical reasoning) and the Central Executive Network occupy overlapping lateral frontoparietal territory.
